Features.AutoHotkey.Dialogue.Title: Automatic Hotkeys
Features.AutoHotkey.Dialogue.lblAutoWalk: Double tap the walk key to continue moving. Tap again to stop.
Features.AutoHotkey.Dialogue.lblAutoSpri: Double tap the sprint key to continue sprinting. Tap again to stop.
Features.AutoHotkey.Dialogue.lblAutoSnea: Double tap the sneak key to continue sneaking. Tap again to stop.
